## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` passes (or pre-existing failures are noted below)
- [ ] `gofmt -w .` run
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or binaries committed
